# poisix

A R package of functions to manipulate Date and POSIXct objects.

## Installation

``` r

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("poissonconsulting/poisix")
```

## Contribution

Please report any
[issues](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/poisix/issues).

[Pull requests](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/poisix/pulls) are
always welcome.

## Code of Conduct

Please note that the poisix project is released with a [Contributor Code
of
Conduct](https://contributor-covenant.org/version/2/0/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.html).
By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`dayte()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisix/reference/dayte.md)
  : Get Day of the year as a Date
- [`dayte_time()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisix/reference/dayte_time.md)
  : Get Day and time of the year as a POSIX
- [`doy()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisix/reference/doy.md)
  : Get Day of the Year
- [`doy2date()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisix/reference/doy2date.md)
  : Day of the Year as an integer to a Date
- [`ps_add_season()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisix/reference/ps_add_season.md)
  : Add Season
- [`ps_get_season()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisix/reference/ps_get_season.md)
  : Get Season
- [`ps_separate_date()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisix/reference/ps_separate_date.md)
  : Separate Date
- [`ps_separate_datetime()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisix/reference/ps_separate_datetime.md)
  : Separate DateTime
- [`ps_utc_offset()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/poisix/reference/ps_utc_offset.md)
  : UTC Offset
